text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka! It happened again! 
I found more crop circles!!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: R-Really? Are you sure you're not just ——

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I swear I wasn't imaginin' things! 
Cross my heart!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It was by the riverbank and in the tall grass 
by the park! There were these swirly-lookin' 
circles in the grass!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
…Huh? But I was training in both 
of those areas recently…

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oho? Does that mean you're 
callin' the UFOs here?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, of course not. That's just—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(Wait… I trained in the last place she found 
circles in too. Does that… mean…)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: N-No way… Am I really… summoning aliens?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Only one way to find out! 
Let's go train on the roof!☆
